summary: SEO system verified end-to-end: backend endpoints, static sitemaps/robots, dynamic per-page SEO on deep links, ItemList on /our-properties, and image alt enrichment all pass.

issues: og:image is a base64 data: URL (very large) instead of an https URL. Some social crawlers (Facebook/LinkedIn) reject/ignore data-URI og:image. Recommend uploading day-trip images to a CDN/Supabase storage and using the public URL, or falling back to https://bonoriya.com/og-banner.jpg.

action_items: Consider replacing base64 data-URI og:image on day-trip pages with a proper https URL for better OG compatibility (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: Day-trip dynamic SEO emits data:image/jpeg;base64 for og:image (~50KB in <head>). This inflates HTML payload and is not universally supported by social scrapers.
Home page has 6 JSON-LD entities in 4 script tags (some grouped) — that satisfies the acceptance (>=3) but consider consolidating with @graph for cleanliness.

verified_acceptance_criteria.our_properties_images_alt: 8/8 imgs have non-empty alt via MutationObserver

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_seo_backend.py covers /api/seo/regenerate-sitemap, /api/seo/sitemap-status and validates the static XML files served by Vite. Frontend deep-link SEO verified via Playwright JS evaluation of document.title, canonical, og:image, and application/ld+json script @type values. Wait ~5s after nav for Supabase-driven SEO to hydrate.
